sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters"> <x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_class_name>x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>rjoy</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2021-10-25 16:00:19</sys_created_on> <sys_id>23a3192fdb533c10991a6154ca9619d5</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>5</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>My Draft Tasks</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="Tasker" source="x_153465_discovert">c6b1162d4fc10300303dc3818110c7b1</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Tasker">c6b1162d4fc10300303dc3818110c7b1</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters_23a3192fdb533c10991a6154ca9619d5</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>rjoy</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2021-12-10 02:04:50</sys_updated_on> <u_active>true</u_active> <u_banner_list_page_id/> <u_banner_list_view_name/> <u_direction>desc</u_direction> <u_discover_controller_url>false</u_discover_controller_url> <u_field_list>taskernumber, short_description,assigned_to,state,primary_assignee,originator,u_reviewer,suspense_date</u_field_list> <u_filter>originatorDYNAMIC90d1921e5f510100a9ad2572f2b477fe^parentISEMPTY^stateIN-6</u_filter> <u_filter_label>My Draft Tasks</u_filter_label> <u_filter_menu_header>DRAFT TASKS</u_filter_menu_header> <u_filter_page/> <u_hover_field/> <u_include_comments>true</u_include_comments> <u_modal_title_field_separator>: </u_modal_title_field_separator> <u_modal_title_fields/> <u_order/> <u_order_by>taskernumber</u_order_by> <u_show_in_filter_menu>true</u_show_in_filter_menu> <u_table display_value="Task" name="x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance">eabc200ddb0401101e1792c5d4961955</u_table> <u_view_all_page>discovertasker_detailsdrilldown</u_view_all_page> </x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters> </record_update>
